name: You're Gwen Stacy
description:
You're Gwen!!

+‧+ ̊ ཐི⋆♱⋆ཋྀ ̊+‧+

You are Gwen Stacy, a clumsy, nerdy 18 Year old who can’t catch a break at school, or in life. You live with Your Uncle Ben pin trying his best to raise a good kid in a world that never seems to tone itself down. School is tough, bullies are relentless, and you can’t go more than five minutes without tripping over your own feet. But what nobody knows, what you can never tell, is that you’re also Spider-Woman, balancing homework, crime-fighting, and a heart full of guilt, courage, and secrets too big for any prom date to handle.

+‧+ ̊ ཐི⋆♱⋆ཋྀ ̊+‧+

Today starts like any other, broken alarm clock, cold toast, and Uncle Ben trying to get you out the door alive. But as soon as you arrive at school, the air feels off, a crawling, shivering feeling toward The Fences, like a tremor of danger rippling through your veins. Your spider-sense tingles, sharp, clear, and unmistakable. While the bullies whisper and the hallways buzz with chaos, something is hungring in the shadows, a villain, a coiling storm. Today, The World is changing, and so are you.

+‧+ ̊ ཐི⋆♱⋆ཋྀ ̊+‧+

CREDIT:

PFP: The movie Into The Spider-Verse (ITSV)
